headline: Lawmakers Block 401(k) Crypto Plan Amid Regulatory Scrutiny

article.title: US lawmakers push back on Labor Department plans to include crypto in 401(k)s
article.summary: The three members of Congress said the volatility of digital assets and “lack of regulation and safeguards” could put Americans’ retirement savings at risk.

headline: SEC Targets Crypto Via 2030 Strategic Plan

article.title: SEC makes digital assets strategic priority through 2030
article.summary: The regulator’s five-year roadmap calls for clearer crypto rules, support for tokenization and a framework for staking and onchain markets.

headline: Crude Surges 3% on US-Iran Talks Breakdown

article.title: Oil Extends Advance on Discordant US-Iran Peace Talk Reports
article.summary: Oil rose a third day, as contradictory headlines on the prospects of a US-Iran peace deal boosted price swings.

headline: Taiwan Central Bank Tames 5% Currency Volatility

article.title: Taiwan’s ‘Big Boss’ Central Bank Is Stamping Out Currency Swings
article.summary: Taiwan’s central bank is extending its reach ever deeper into foreign-exchange markets, seeking to ensure currency stability as the artificial intelligence boom intensifies a divide between the island’s tech sector and the rest of the economy.
